stage: Rung-4c — embodiment-invariant stress instrument + the graded EH measurement
purpose: Replace the embodiment-biased wrist-incoming-force stress proxy (Rung-4b blocker) with an embodiment-INVARIANT measure — the bar's internal coupling spring force (K_c x deflection of the grip frame from the bar end), the actual force the cooperative coupling bears — re-derive f_max for it from the matched-Panda-pair distribution, and measure the graded embodiment Δ (frozen incumbent + xArm6 vs the matched reference) on the corrected compliant-coupling task. Pre-registered BEFORE the reference/shifted measurement.

governance.phase: Phase-2 (scope question open; does not block).
governance.governed_predicate_change: the stress measure is part of the success predicate; this change is recorded in the ADR-026 open-question + a co-carry spec §4/§8 amendment and pre-registered (this file + git tag) before f_max is re-derived or anything is measured.
governance.invariant_by_construction: the measure is the bar coupling spring force (a function of the bar/coupling geometry only), identical physical quantity regardless of which arm body holds the bar — unlike the wrist proxy, which folded in the arm's own link-incoming-joint dynamics (arm self-weight/inertia that never reaches the bar).
governance.no_goalpost_moving: f_max re-derived ONLY from the matched-Panda-pair coupling distribution (1.25 x matched-success p99), then held. NOT inflated to admit the xArm6. C_min unchanged (0.75). Predicate logic, 0.10 m radius unchanged.
governance.frozen_incumbent_eval_only: the stress measure affects only the success predicate + the training reward penalty, NOT the frozen incumbent's inference-time policy input (the ego state carries no stress term). So the frozen incumbent (step 100000, SHA 6290e2ae) is valid as-is for this EVAL-only measurement — no retraining; it transfers by construction. (A re-freeze would only matter if training under the new reward; not needed here.)
governance.immutable_prior_results_I8: rigid ladder (rung1-4) + Rung-4b artifacts untouched; this writes only under rung4c/.

compliant_coupling.variant: A (linear freed-axis spring; the Rung-4b stiffest C1-C3-valid setting)

stress_instrument.measure: coupling (total bar coupling spring force = K_c x ||grip_frame_world - bar_end_world||, max over holding arms)
stress_instrument.invariance_finding: The coupling measure removes the wrist proxy's arm-self-weight confound (xArm6/Panda active-state ratio 17x -> 7.8x). It does NOT make the values equal, because the xArm6 GENUINELY over-loads the coupling: ~6.4x the matched pair even at a zero-action static hold, not removable by joint actuation (stiffness already 10x Panda; force_limit sweep 100-1000 N does not converge to Panda levels). The residual is a real embodiment load (the xArm6's carry-pose endpoint stiffness is poor -> it sags under the bar and over-tensions the coupling), NOT an instrument artifact. So the Rung-4b 'pure instrument' hypothesis is refuted, and the measure is the correct invariant safety/stress instrument under which the embodiment effect is real.

fmax_rederivation.rule: f_max_coupling = 1.25 x (matched-Panda-pair coupling-force success p99), measured under stress_measure='coupling' over the f_max seeds, committed as the artifact of record, then held.
fmax_rederivation.note: Principled from the matched distribution exactly as the rigid f_max (130.6 N) was; the numeric value differs because the measure differs (coupling force, not wrist force).

revalidation.matched_reference: frozen incumbent + matched cocarry_impedance partner under coupling+new f_max must reconfirm >= 0.90 (else STOP).
revalidation.binding: the new unstressed conjunct is load-bearing on matched successes.

ph_floor.note: the Rung-3 admitted policy-shift teammates (same Panda body), re-measured under the coupling measure on the compliant task -> the same-task control-style floor for the EH-vs-control-style separation.

eh_measurement.shifted: frozen incumbent + xArm6 (cocarry_xarm6_impedance) under stress_measure='coupling' + new f_max.
eh_measurement.reference: frozen incumbent + matched cocarry_impedance partner, same coupling + f_max.
eh_measurement.capability_gate: xArm6 calibration vs the cooperative Panda ego under the coupling measure must clear C_min=0.75 to be admitted; C_min never weakened.
eh_measurement.statistics: graded Δ = success(reference) - success(shifted), per-seed paired; cluster (seed) bootstrap one-sided 95% CI; IQM secondary; cluster-robust binomial GEE confirmatory; per-conjunct breakdown (placed/level/unstressed/static).
eh_measurement.decision_rule: drop iff pooled mean Δ >= Δ_min AND one-sided 95% CI excludes 0; null iff positive control holds AND CI excludes Δ_min; else indeterminate. Separate embodiment from control-style via the PH floor (an EH drop beyond the PH control-style spread is attributed to embodiment).

seeds_disjoint: f_max 80000-, PH 80100-, EH 80200- — all disjoint from every prior set (rigid S/V 10000-/20000-, Rung-3 30000-/40000-, Rung-4 50000-/60000-, Rung-4b 70010-).
honesty_statement: As of commit, no reference/shifted EH episode (seeds 80200-) has been scored under the frozen incumbent on the coupling measure; f_max (80000-) is derived from the matched pair first and held. The invariance investigation (rung4c_invariance.json) used development seeds 70010-.
